perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a kitchen with a woman dressed as a mother (wearing a curly wig and a cat-patterned apron) washing apples in a sink while a young girl eats in the background. (2) The mother stares intensely at the girl, counting slowly from 1 to 2.9 to pressure her to finish her meal. (3) The mother takes a bite of an apple and looks satisfied, transitioning into a product demonstration of fruit wash. (4) The scene shifts to the mother entering the front door with a silver bag, discovering messy clothes on the floor and sighing in frustration. (5) Another scene shows the girl lying in bed in a dark room using her phone; the mother enters and uses a massage gun on her shoulder. (6) The final segment shows the mother surrounded by 'citiesocial' cardboard boxes, speaking directly to the camera while the girl brings in more boxes. The mother points at a laptop and various products while graphics explaining a promotion appear.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, slightly quirky instrumental music plays with a steady rhythm. (2) A female voice (mother) naggy and high-pitched is heard complaining about the child eating too slowly and counting numbers. (3) Sound effects (SFX) like fruit crunching and water splashing are heard during product close-ups. (4) The music transitions to a more melodic, cheerful tone as the mother's voice becomes more friendly and instructional during the promotion reveal. (5) Ambient noise of a door closing and the mechanical hum of a massage gun are audible. (6) The video ends with a clear, professional narration explaining the 'citiesocial' platform's rewards and prize draw.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '媽媽常說的話 1. 永遠數不到3' (Things mothers often say 1. Never counting to 3) - Hook Text. (2) 'Goodies & Co. 二合一蔬果碗盤洗潔劑' - Functional Text. (3) '媽媽常說的話 2. 到底要講幾次!!!' (2. How many times do I have to tell you!!!) - Hook Text. (4) 'Miyansol 韓國皺皺托特包' - Functional Text. (5) '媽媽常說的話 3. 幾點了還不睡' (3. What time is it and you're still not sleeping) - Hook Text. (6) 'ODOYO magic punch 迷你筋膜槍' - Functional Text. (7) 'citiesocial' and various promotional details like '88折' (12% off) and '東京來回機票抽獎活動' (Tokyo round-trip ticket draw) - Functional/Decorative Text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro comedic scenarios -> Integrated product features -> Detailed platform promotion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 woman playing the mother role, 1 girl playing the daughter role
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The mother character wears a brown curly-haired wig, a white sweater with yellow details, and a beige apron with black cat prints.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern home environment including a kitchen with black hardware, a bright living room with a white dining table, and a cozy bedroom with warm lamp lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural light combined with studio fill light; warm mood lighting in the bedroom scene.

vocal_qualities.tone: Comedic, nagging, then professional and informative

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook (Relatable Scenarios) -> Montage (Product Solutions) -> CTA (Promotion Details)
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional commercial for the 'citiesocial' select-shop platform. It uses three relatable 'things mothers often say' scenarios to naturally introduce high-quality lifestyle products (fruit wash, tote bag, massage gun) available on the platform, eventually leading into a comprehensive explanation of an upcoming sales event and a prize draw to drive user traffic to the site.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The influencer directly interacts with branded products, features them in skits, and spends the last half of the video detailing a specific website promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Exaggerated mother character performance, fast-paced listicle format, high-density decorative captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends short-form comedy with a deep-dive promotion, utilizing a 'mother-daughter' dynamic to appeal to female consumers interested in home and lifestyle products.
